memory.serverInstructions: Knowledge graph memory system for AI automation. Create, search, and manage entities (lessons, patterns, preferences) with relations. Use for persistent learning, tracking successes/failures, and storing workflow configurations. Tools: memory_create_entities, memory_create_relations, memory_add_observations, memory_read_graph, memory_search_nodes, memory_open_nodes, memory_delete_entities, memory_delete_observations, memory_delete_relations, check_memory_health, check_memory_contradictions, archive_stale_entities, consolidate_memory_entities, list_archived_entities, audit_analysis_learnings.
